title: BEM-866 repair invalid YAML
objective:
Run script:
"""
# 1) Remove risky inline mailbox step from claude.yml if present.
claude = Path('.github/workflows/claude.yml')
if claude.exists():
    lines = claude.read_text(encoding='utf-8').splitlines()
    out = []
    i = 0
    remove_markers = ['BEM-866 mailbox write for Claude selftest', 'BEM-865 Claude mailbox write selftest']
    while i < len(lines):
        line = lines[i]
        if any(marker in line for marker in remove_markers):
            indent = len(line) - len(line.lstrip(' '))
            i += 1
            while i < len(lines):
                nxt = lines[i]
                nindent = len(nxt) - len(nxt.lstrip(' '))
                if nxt.lstrip().startswith('- name:') and nindent == indent:
                    break
                i += 1
            continue
        out.append(line)
        i += 1
    claude.write_text('\n'.join(out).rstrip() + '\n', encoding='utf-8')

# 2) Rewrite isolated workflow with YAML-safe shell, no heredoc.
wf = Path('.github/workflows/claude_write_selftest.yml')
wf.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
wf.write_text('''name: claude_write_selftest

on:
  workflow_dispatch:
    inputs:
      trace_id:
        description: "Trace id"
        required: true
        type: string

permissions:
  contents: write

jobs:
  write_mailbox:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - name: Checkout
        uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          token: ${{ secrets.AI_SYSTEM_GITHUB_PAT }}

      - name: Write Claude selftest mailbox
        run: |
          mkdir -p governance/audit/mailbox/from_claude
          {
            echo "# BEM-865 CLAUDE WRITE SELFTEST RESPONSE"
            echo "Status: CLAUDE_WRITE_OK"
            echo "Writer: claude_write_selftest.yml"
            echo "Trace: ${{ inputs.trace_id }}"
          } > governance/audit/mailbox/from_claude/BEM865_CLAUDE_WRITE_SELFTEST_RESPONSE.md

      - name: Commit mailbox write
        run: |
          git config user.name "claude-internal-auditor"
          git config user.email "actions@users.noreply.github.com"
          git add governance/audit/mailbox/from_claude/BEM865_CLAUDE_WRITE_SELFTEST_RESPONSE.md
          if ! git diff --cached --quiet; then
            git commit -m "BEM-865 Claude write selftest mailbox"
            git pull --rebase --autostash origin main
            git push origin HEAD:main
          fi
''', encoding='utf-8')

marker = Path('governance/runtime/curator_dispatch/BEM866_INVALID_YAML_REPAIRED.md')
marker.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
marker.write_text('# BEM-866 invalid YAML repaired\nStatus: REPAIRED\nFiles:\n- .github/workflows/claude.yml\n- .github/workflows/claude_write_selftest.yml\n', encoding='utf-8')
changed_files.append(str(claude))
changed_files.append(str(wf))
changed_files.append(str(marker))
ops_applied.append('repaired invalid YAML and removed risky claude.yml mailbox step')
"""
No issue comments.
